description_long: This sculpture depicts a seated human figure, possibly female, with an arm raised above the head and the other arm resting on the lap. The figure appears to be partially draped, with visible folds of fabric and a classical pose reminiscent of Greco-Roman statuary. The base is irregular and textured, suggesting a naturalistic rock or pedestal. The surface is predominantly gray with subtle variations, indicating a stone or concrete material. The overall form is compact, with detailed anatomical features and a sense of weight and solidity.
description: A gray stone-like sculpture of a seated human figure with one arm raised, resting on a textured base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full seated figure, raised arm, and draped fabric details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the figure and the curvature of the back.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the figure and the irregular base.
description_view_3: Right side view with the figure's head turned and more of the draped fabric visible.
attribute_subject_matter: seated human figure in classical style
attribute_location_context: No clear environmental context is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
